justification_text: Puskesmas Cancar receives 22 of the 30 required units of Spiramycin (73 percent coverage). The allocation was prioritized mainly due to the drug urgency category and a depleted stock position. District supply covers 64 percent of the total requirement for this drug, so full coverage is not possible this cycle. The remaining 8 units are deferred to inter facility redistribution or the next resupply.
